message:
fix(core): use last two path components for Git remote normalization

Correct project slug computation from Git remote URLs by using the
rightmost path components instead of the first two. Renamed function
normalize_remote_first_two -> normalize_remote_last_two to reflect
the actual behavior.

Fixes edge cases in project identity assignment where Git remotes with
nested paths (e.g., gitlab subgroups) produced incorrect slugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
